title: heliophila dregeana
intro: Heliophila dregeana, commonly known as the Droge's hairy crabs eye or Droge's hairy crabs claw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Heliophila dregeana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its perceived benefits in treating various health conditions.
